summary: Multi-impacts bug fix (P0) verified. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: GuidedEntryModal correctly displays multi-impacts with business rules applied. The fix correctly handles: (1) Scope 2 entry → creates scope2 + scope3_3 activities, (2) Scope 3.3 entry → creates only scope3_3 activity, (3) Scope 3 generic entry → creates only scope3 activity.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed: normalize_scope() and apply_business_rules() functions correctly implement GHG Protocol rules
Backend and frontend logic are aligned - both use same business rules for multi-impacts filtering
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-impacts bug fix verified. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_multi_impacts.py covers all business rules. Hydroélectricité factor has 3 impacts: scope2=0.0008832, scope3_3=0.00388983, scope3=0.0008832. Category 3.3 (activites_combustibles_energie) is auto-calculated from Scope 1/2 entries.

scope2_entry.description: Creates 2 activities (scope2 + scope3_3) for multi-impact factor
scope2_entry.business_rule: Scope 1/2 entry → include scope1, scope2, scope3_3 impacts

scope3_3_entry.description: Creates 1 activity (scope3_3 only) for category activites_combustibles_energie
scope3_3_entry.business_rule: Scope 3.3 entry → include only scope3_3 impacts

scope3_generic_entry.description: Creates 1 activity (scope3 only) for other Scope 3 categories
scope3_generic_entry.business_rule: Scope 3 entry → include only scope3 impacts

backend_api.GET /api/activities/groups/{group_id}: PASS - Returns all activities in a group
backend_api.DELETE /api/activities/groups/{group_id}: PASS - Deletes all activities in a group

GuidedEntryModal.multi_impacts_display: PASS - Shows all impacts from factor with scope labels
GuidedEntryModal.business_rules_indicator: PASS - Shows 'Règle métier appliquée' when impacts are filtered
GuidedEntryModal.emissions_calculation: PASS - Correctly calculates emissions for each impact

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Multi-impacts logic not working correctly for Scope 3 and Scope 3.3 entries
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: normalize_scope() incorrectly converted 'scope3_amont' to 'scope3_3'. In reality, scope3_amont (Scope 3 Amont général) is NOT scope3_3 (catégorie 3.3 spécifique du GHG Protocol - amont énergie)
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Removed 'scope3_amont' from scope3_3 normalization list. Added special logic for category 'activites_combustibles_energie' to trigger scope3_3 rule
